name: Battle Royale
description: Last-player-standing multiplayer shooter with scavenging, survival, and a shrinking play zone

mechanics.coreLoop: Drop into map → Scavenge weapons and gear → Survive encounters with other players → Stay within safe zone → Outlast all opponents → Win chicken dinner
playerActions: Parachute/drop into starting location from aircraft
Loot buildings and supply drops for weapons, armor, and items
Engage in tactical gunfights with other players
Heal and revive teammates (in team modes)
Use vehicles for fast travel across large maps
Build cover or defensive structures (in some variants)
Monitor and stay within the shrinking safe zone

mechanics: Find increasingly powerful loot (common → rare → epic → legendary)
Persistent player rank/tier system across matches
Cosmetic unlocks through achievements or purchase

winConditions: Be the last player (or squad) alive
Survive until all other players are eliminated
failConditions: Entire squad is eliminated (in team modes)
Caught outside safe zone when it fully closes
Match ends with player not in top position

resourceSystems.name: Health
resourceSystems.mechanics: Depletes from damage, restored with med kits and bandages

resourceSystems.name: Shield/Armor
resourceSystems.mechanics: Absorbs damage before health, recharged with shield cells/batteries

resourceSystems.name: Ammunition
resourceSystems.mechanics: Multiple ammo types for different weapons, must be scavenged

resourceSystems.name: Equipment Slots
resourceSystems.mechanics: Limited inventory space for tactical items and healing

setting.location: Large-scale island, archipelago, or urban warzone with diverse biomes
setting.worldType: Military simulation or dystopian competition setting

protagonist.background: Skilled mercenary, soldier, or competitor in a deadly tournament
protagonist.motivation: Survive, win glory, claim prize money, or complete a mission objective

conflict.primary: 100 players fight to the death in an ever-shrinking arena until only one remains
secondary: Environmental hazards (storms, toxic zones, collapsing structures)

worldRules.physics: Realistic ballistics and weapon handling with arcade elements for accessibility
worldRules.magic: No magic - pure tactical shooter with possible sci-fi technology
worldRules.technology: Modern/near-future weapons, tactical gear, drones, respawn beacons, advanced optics

difficulty: High skill ceiling, punishing for beginners
targetAudience: Competitive players seeking high-stakes PvP experiences
